ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region to which the country belongs */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the country */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "happiness_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country associated with the score */,
  "overall_rank" INTEGER /* Overall rank of the country */,
  "score" REAL /* Happiness score of the country */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita for the country */,
  "social_support" REAL /* Social support rating */,
  "healthy_life_expectancy" REAL /* Healthy life expectancy */,
  "freedom_to_make_choices" REAL /* Freedom to make life choices rating */,
  "generosity" REAL /* Generosity rating */,
  "perceptions_of_corruption" REAL /* Perception of corruption rating */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the score was recorded */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source used to compile the score */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the score was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the score was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_happiness_scores_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_happiness_scores_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the region */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent the region belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., GDP per capita) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the metric */,
  "unit_type" TEXT /* Type of unit used for the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL for the data source */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the data source was published */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "score_id" INTEGER /* ID of the happiness score entry being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_score_id FOREIGN KEY ("score_id") REFERENCES happiness_scores ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "happiness_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator */,
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the score associated with the indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the happiness indicator */,
  "indicator_value" REAL /* Value of the happiness indicator */,
  "indicator_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the happiness indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_happiness_indicators_score_id FOREIGN KEY ("score_id") REFERENCES happiness_scores ("score_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the metric associated with the statistic */,
  "mean" REAL /* Mean value of the metric */,
  "median" REAL /* Median value of the metric */,
  "standard_deviation" REAL /* Standard deviation of the metric */,
  "data_range" TEXT /* Range of data used for the statistical analysis */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* Method used for the statistical analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., global, regional) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
